intro: Planning removals in Aldeburgh? Orwell Removals & Storage is the family-run Suffolk firm that has been looking after moves like yours since 2005. Operating from Old Station Works in Westerfield, near Ipswich, we know the Heritage Coast well, so reaching this much-loved town in the IP15 postcode is part of our usual routine. Aldeburgh has a particular charm, with its shingle beach, fishing huts and rich musical heritage, and the homes here are just as individual, from seafront houses and period cottages to apartments tucked along the quieter streets. We shape every move around the property and the people in it, wrapping and handling your belongings with real care. Every move we carry out is fully covered, and we keep communication clear and warm from your first enquiry to the final box unpacked, so that a move in such a special place feels calm, organised and entirely in safe hands.

sections.h: Arriving on the Suffolk Heritage Coast
sections.p:
Aldeburgh draws a thoughtful sort of resident, and we have helped a good many of them settle in. There are families seeking life by the sea, music lovers and creatives connected to the festival tradition, and people retiring to enjoy the slower coastal pace. Some are buying a permanent home, others a cherished retreat for weekends and summers, and the move looks a little different in each case.

The housing is wonderfully varied. Handsome seafront properties face the shingle, period cottages line the older streets, and apartments offer easy coastal living near the centre. Every type brings its own moving-day considerations, from steep cottage stairs and slim doorways to shared entrances, tight landings and the need to protect bright, sea-facing rooms from knocks. We discuss it all at the survey and build a clear plan around your home, dismantling and reassembling furniture as required, so that when the van pulls up the whole day already feels organised and unhurried.

sections.h: Shingle, Narrow Streets and Loading in IP15
sections.p:
Aldeburgh's setting makes local knowledge invaluable on the day. The streets near the seafront and the high street can be narrow, parking is frequently in short supply, and the town grows busy through the warmer months, so a well-judged arrival time makes all the difference. We plan around that, picking the closest safe point to bring the lorry in and avoiding the busiest stretches of the day.

Where the carry is longer, perhaps along a pedestrianised lane or close to the shingle, we arrive equipped with trolleys, ramps and protective coverings to keep both your possessions and the property safe. The coastal conditions are simply part of the job, and our crews handle them with ease, keeping the lorry on firm ground and your belongings clear of the shingle. The A1094 links Aldeburgh to the main A12, giving us a dependable route whether you are moving within the town, along the Heritage Coast or further inland. With the parking and access settled in advance, the move stays calm and everything keeps flowing as it should.

sections.h: Music, Sea and a Move Made Easy
sections.p:
Few places have Aldeburgh's atmosphere. The Aldeburgh Festival and nearby Snape Maltings keep the town's musical heritage alive, Maggi Hambling's Scallop sculpture sits striking on the shingle, and the fishing huts still sell the day's fresh catch by the beach. It is a town that rewards slowing down and savouring, which is exactly why so many people decide to make it their own, whether for good or as a treasured second home by the sea.

Whatever draws you to the coast, the move should be the easy part. We take on the packing, the wrapping, the lifting and the careful transport, so you are free to enjoy arriving in such a special spot. As a family-run Suffolk business, we treat every Aldeburgh move with the same genuine care, offering honest advice, careful planning and a crew who truly mind that your belongings arrive in perfect order. That has been our promise since 2005, and we are proud to bring it to this corner of the Heritage Coast.

faqs: Can you move us into a seafront property or cottage in Aldeburgh?

Yes, we regularly move people into seafront homes and period cottages across IP15. Our crews take care with narrow streets, steep stairs and sea-facing rooms, and we plan the closest safe loading point in advance so your Aldeburgh move runs smoothly.
Do you cover Aldeburgh and nearby spots like Snape along the Heritage Coast?

We do. Alongside Aldeburgh itself we serve the surrounding Heritage Coast, including the area around Snape. Wherever you are moving to or from, we will check access, parking and timing beforehand so the day is calm and well organised.
